metadata.title: Find Comfort in God's Word
metadata.description: Upload an image or share your feelings. AI will match a comforting Bible verse and generate a peaceful video for you.

generator.title: Find Comfort in God's Word
generator.subtitle: Upload an image or share your feelings. AI will match a comforting Bible verse and generate a peaceful video for you.

form.prompt_placeholder: Describe the scene, feelings, or Bible verse you want to visualize
form.step1_label: What is weighing on your heart today?
form.step1_placeholder: I feel anxious about my job...
form.user_feeling_placeholder: What is weighing on your heart today?

generator.download_description: Choose what you want to download

generator.sign_in_to_generate: Sign In to Receive Your Prayer
generator.do_not_close_page: Please do not close this page while the video is being generated. The process will continue in the background.

settings.title: Video Settings
settings.free_user_limit: Free users can only use 480p resolution. Please purchase credits to unlock 720p and 1080p.
settings.generate_audio_hint: Add background music and sound effects to your video

merge.insufficient_credits: You need more than 3 credits to merge videos. Please purchase credits to use this feature.
